modelIdentification.name: JLVC-Artillery
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-Artillery provides Artillery components neccessary for use in the JLVC federation.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module contains the additional object attributes and interactions necessary for Artillery communication.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2024 - Draft 1 of JLVC Modular FOM. Corrected octet datatype use. Removed redundant count parameter NumPoints from ArtyGeometry and ArtyRadarZone.
JLVC2024 - Updated version number from 2024 to 1.
JLVC2026 - Version 2: Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names. Added RPR Enumerations module as a reference dependency.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module

interactionClass.name: ArtyInteraction
interactionClass.semantics: Base Interaction Class with shared data for all expected Artillery Interactions used for JCATS/SIMPLE/AFATDS Interplays.

parameter.name: TargetNumber
parameter.semantics: Provides target number for artillery acquisition. Datatype same as ArtyCallForFire:TargetNumber

parameter.name: Munitions
parameter.semantics: An array of at least one element with the max of three.

parameter.name: TimeOnTarget
parameter.semantics: Optional. Time as number of seconds since the start of the 1970 epoch (aka Unix epoch – 00:00:00 01 Jan 1970)

parameter.name: EffectiveTime
parameter.semantics: Optional. Time as number of seconds since the start of the 1970 epoch (aka Unix epoch – 00:00:00 01 Jan 1970)

parameter.name: EffectiveTime
parameter.semantics: Optional. Time as number of seconds since the start of the 1970 epoch (aka Unix epoch – 00:00:00 01 Jan 1970)

parameter.name: EffectiveTime
parameter.semantics: Optional. Time as number of seconds since the start of the 1970 epoch (aka Unix epoch – 00:00:00 01 Jan 1970)

parameter.name: ExpirationTime
parameter.semantics: Optional. Time as number of seconds since the start of the 1970 epoch (aka Unix epoch – 00:00:00 01 Jan 1970)

parameter.name: Points
parameter.semantics: Zero or more elements, not to exceed NumPoints, i.e. cardinality 0+, NumPoints.

parameter.name: Corridors
parameter.semantics: Zero or more elements, not to exceed NumPoints-1, i.e. cardinality 0+, NumPoints-1

parameter.name: DeactivateTime
parameter.semantics: Optional. Time as number of seconds since the start of the 1970 epoch (aka Unix epoch – 00:00:00 01 Jan 1970)

parameter.name: EffectiveTime
parameter.semantics: Optional. Time as number of seconds since the start of the 1970 epoch (aka Unix epoch – 00:00:00 01 Jan 1970)

parameter.name: Geometry
parameter.semantics: One or more elements, not to exceed NumPoints, i.e. cardinality 1+, NumPoints

parameter.name: Radius
parameter.semantics: An optional value denoting the radius of a circular radar zone in meters. If present, only one point shall be passed in the Geometry parameter, denoting the center of the circular radar zone. Optional.

parameter.name: Name
parameter.semantics: An optional identifier which may be provided by the creator of the zone. Optional.

parameter.name: EffectiveTime
parameter.semantics: Optional. Time as number of seconds since the start of the 1970 epoch (aka Unix epoch – 00:00:00 01 Jan 1970)

enumeratedData.name: ArtyMissionPhaseEnum16
enumeratedData.semantics: the phase the artillery fire mission is in

arrayData.name: ItemStockArray
arrayData.semantics: zero or more items of stock.

arrayData.name: SPFSetArray1Plus
arrayData.semantics: An array of at least one SPFSet element with the max of three.

field.name: Propellant
field.semantics: OPTIONAL; a value in this field is not required.

field.name: Fuze
field.semantics: OPTIONAL; a value in this field is not required.
